type: 方形 Graphical Abstract（ACS / Wiley 风格）
goal: 生成一张严格 1:1 方形的期刊 Graphical Abstract，四象限严格等大，工程化克制配色，内容关于硅碳复合负极循环稳定性

canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text, suitable for grayscale print

title_block.rule: ACS allows titles on the article page rather than inside the graphical abstract

sections.label: Problem
sections.summary: Si anodes suffer >300% volumetric expansion, leading to SEI rupture and capacity fading
sections.depiction: top-left quadrant: a minimal cross-sectional sketch of a silicon particle before and after lithiation, the lithiated particle visibly larger with cracking lines on its SEI shell, line-art only

sections.label: Method
sections.summary: gradient-porous Si@C composite synthesized via spray-drying + carbonization
sections.depiction: top-right quadrant: a small schematic of a porous Si@C particle, with inner Si nanodomains, gradient mesoporous carbon shell, and a tiny inset showing spray-drying nozzle plus furnace icons connected by thin arrows

sections.label: Mechanism
sections.summary: gradient pores accommodate expansion and stabilize a flexible SEI
sections.depiction: bottom-left quadrant: same Si@C particle during lithiation, with arrows indicating expansion vectors absorbed into the porous shell; SEI drawn as a thin continuous outer line, no cracks; line-art style

sections.label: Outcome
sections.summary: improved capacity retention and Coulombic efficiency over 200 cycles
sections.depiction: bottom-right quadrant: a minimal qualitative line-chart sketch with two curves over 'cycle number'; baseline curve drops faster, proposed Si@C curve stays high; no numerical tick labels, qualitative only

section_block_style.shape: no heavy borders; quadrants separated by whitespace and a faint cross-axis guide line
section_block_style.header_text: label at top-left of each quadrant, bold sans-serif 12pt
section_block_style.summary_text: single phrase below header, 10pt regular, max 2 lines, no period

connectors.style: thin arrows (1.2px) with simple triangle arrowheads, dark gray #334155
connectors.rule: Z-shaped reading flow Q1 → Q2 → Q3 → Q4, arrows kept short and only at quadrant boundaries; no crossing arrows, no decorative arcs

color_palette.rule: deep blue #1E3A8A for Si domains, slate gray #475569 for carbon shell, charcoal #1F2937 for line-art and text; one low-saturation amber #F59E0B reserved for the proposed-method curve in Q4

typography.consistency: all four quadrant labels identical size; all four summaries identical size

must_keep: all four quadrants strictly equal size and equal visual weight
white background, no gradient, no decorative pattern, no photo-realistic textures
all numbers are qualitative; no fabricated capacity values, no fabricated cycle numbers
the figure must look like an ACS Energy Letters TOC graphic
avoid: 3D rendering of battery cells, glossy metallic fills, lens flare, motion blur
exaggerated cracks, sparks, smoke, or dramatic lithiation visuals
fabricated numerical tick values, fabricated capacity percentages
saturated colors, more than 3 main colors plus 1 accent
